SSH schism: Fixed — terminal.backend: local, Docker on host, SSH wrapper for native tools only 292| 2. Memory OOM: volatility3 runs on host (all RAM), Docker --memory=16g flag for large dumps 293| 3. VM lifecycle: Human starts SIFT VM before session. Canary checks connectivity. 294| 4. Tool drift: NEVER 'sift update'.
